title: Copart (CPRT) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: Copart (CPRT) reports robust earnings and revenues in the third quarter of fiscal 2022. It witnesses strength in sales across segments.

title: Wall Street Melts on Panic Selling: Buy 5 Bigwigs On the Dip

title: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.74% and 9.24%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Copart Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2022 Financial Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) today reported financial results for the quarter ended April 30, 2022. For the three months ended April 30, 2022, revenue, gross profit, and net income were $939.9 million, $436.3 million, and $278.6 million, respectively. These represent an increase in revenue of $206.0 million, or 28.1%; an increase in gross profit of $54.9 million, or 14.4%; and a decrease in net income of $(8.2) million, or (2.9)%, respectively, from the same period last

title: Copart, Inc. to Release Third Quarter Fiscal 2022 Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) announced today that it will release earnings for the third quarter of fiscal 2022 after the close of market on Wednesday, May 18, 2022. On Thursday, May 19, 2022, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (10:00 a.m. Central), Copart will conduct a conference call to discuss the results for the quarter. The call will be webcast live and can be accessed via hyperlink at www.copart.com/investorrelations. A replay of the call will be available through August
